description_long: This object is a rectangular lotion container with a sleek, modern design, featuring a predominantly black exterior. The top surface displays a bold, abstract red and white graphic, possibly representing a brand or product theme, with some white text visible. The container is compact and flat, suggesting it is a travel-sized or sample lotion package. The sides are smooth and unadorned, emphasizing the minimalist aesthetic. The material appears to be a hard plastic, giving it a sturdy and durable feel. The overall appearance is stylish and suitable for urban environments such as public restrooms, gyms, or personal bags.
description: A compact, rectangular black lotion container with abstract red and white graphics and a smooth, hard plastic exterior.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main graphic and text on the top surface, with the container's thickness visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat, rectangular profile and the full extent of the top graphic.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, but with less visible text and graphic detail.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the flat profile and the top surface design.
